creator: ngie@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Sun, May 23, 2010 at 2:55 AM, Koop Mast <kwm@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Hi, py-gstreamer specifies USE_GNOME=pygtk2 so the dependency is added.
> I think there is a problem with your py-gtk2 install. Can you reinstall
> it and try py-gstreamer again?

    Yeah, it was missing for some odd reason (x11-toolkit/py-gtk was
present though). The rebuild appears to work perfectly fine so far.
Thanks!
-Garrett
